# Next.js App Router — NocoDB Integration

Generate these files for Next.js projects using the App Router (`app/` directory).

## Files to Generate

### 1. `lib/nocodb.ts` — Server-side NocoDB client

```typescript
/**
 * NocoDB API Client — Server-side only
 * Generated by nocodb-crud skill
 *
 * Usage: import { nocodb } from '@/lib/nocodb'
 */

interface NocoDBConfig {
  baseUrl: string;
  tableId: string;
  apiKey: string;
}

interface ListParams {
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
  where?: string;
  sort?: string;
  fields?: string;
  viewId?: string;
}

interface PageInfo {
  totalRows: number;
  page: number;
  pageSize: number;
  isFirstPage: boolean;
  isLastPage: boolean;
}

interface ListResponse<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
  list: T[];
  pageInfo: PageInfo;
}

class NocoDBError extends Error {
  status: number;
  raw: unknown;
  constructor(message: string, status: number, raw?: unknown) {
    super(message);
    this.name = 'NocoDBError';
    this.status = status;
    this.raw = raw;
  }
}

const config: NocoDBConfig = {
  baseUrl: process.env.NOCODB_URL || '',
  tableId: process.env.NOCODB_TABLE_ID || '',
  apiKey: process.env.NOCODB_API_KEY || '',
};

function getEndpoint(path = '') {
  return `${config.baseUrl}/api/v2/tables/${config.tableId}${path}`;
}

function getHeaders(): HeadersInit {
  return {
    'xc-token': config.apiKey,
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  };
}

async function request<T>(url: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {
  let lastError: Error | null = null;
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt++) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers: { ...getHeaders(), ...options.headers } });
      if (res.status === 429) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
        continue;
      }
      if (!res.ok) {
        const body = await res.text();
        let parsed: unknown;
        try { parsed = JSON.parse(body); } catch { parsed = body; }
        if (res.status === 401) throw new NocoDBError('Authentication failed — check NOCODB_API_KEY', 401, parsed);
        if (res.status === 404) throw new NocoDBError('Not found', 404, parsed);
        throw new NocoDBError(`NocoDB error ${res.status}: ${body}`, res.status, parsed);
      }
      const text = await res.text();
      return text ? JSON.parse(text) as T : {} as T;
    } catch (e) {
      if (e instanceof NocoDBError) throw e;
      lastError = e as Error;
      if (attempt < 2) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
    }
  }
  throw lastError || new Error('NocoDB request failed after retries');
}

export const nocodb = {
  /** List records with optional pagination, filtering, sorting */
  async list<T = Record<string, unknown>>(params: ListParams = {}): Promise<ListResponse<T>> {
    const query = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.limit) query.set('limit', String(params.limit));
    if (params.offset) query.set('offset', String(params.offset));
    if (params.where) query.set('where', params.where);
    if (params.sort) query.set('sort', params.sort);
    if (params.fields) query.set('fields', params.fields);
    if (params.viewId) query.set('viewId', params.viewId);
    const qs = query.toString();
    return request<ListResponse<T>>(`${getEndpoint('/records')}${qs ? '?' + qs : ''}`);
  },

  /** Get a single record by row ID */
  async get<T = Record<string, unknown>>(rowId: number | string): Promise<T> {
    return request<T>(getEndpoint(`/records/${rowId}`));
  },

  /** Create a single record */
  async create<T = Record<string, unknown>>(data: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<T> {
    return request<T>(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },

  /** Create multiple records in bulk */
  async bulkCreate<T = Record<string, unknown>>(records: Record<string, unknown>[]): Promise<T[]> {
    return request<T[]>(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(records) });
  },

  /** Update a single record (must include Id field) */
  async update<T = Record<string, unknown>>(data: Record<string, unknown> & { Id: number }): Promise<T> {
    return request<T>(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },

  /** Update multiple records in bulk (each must include Id) */
  async bulkUpdate<T = Record<string, unknown>>(records: (Record<string, unknown> & { Id: number })[]): Promise<T[]> {
    return request<T[]>(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify(records) });
  },

  /** Delete a single record by Id */
  async delete(id: number): Promise<unknown> {
    return request(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify({ Id: id }) });
  },

  /** Delete multiple records by Ids */
  async bulkDelete(ids: number[]): Promise<unknown> {
    return request(getEndpoint('/records'), { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify(ids.map(Id => ({ Id }))) });
  },
};
```

### 2. `app/api/nocodb/route.ts` — List + Create + Update + Delete

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { nocodb } from '@/lib/nocodb';

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { searchParams } = req.nextUrl;
    const data = await nocodb.list({
      limit: Number(searchParams.get('limit')) || 25,
      offset: Number(searchParams.get('offset')) || 0,
      where: searchParams.get('where') || undefined,
      sort: searchParams.get('sort') || undefined,
      fields: searchParams.get('fields') || undefined,
    });
    return NextResponse.json(data);
  } catch (e: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e.message }, { status: e.status || 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    const data = Array.isArray(body) ? await nocodb.bulkCreate(body) : await nocodb.create(body);
    return NextResponse.json(data, { status: 201 });
  } catch (e: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e.message }, { status: e.status || 500 });
  }
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    const data = Array.isArray(body) ? await nocodb.bulkUpdate(body) : await nocodb.update(body);
    return NextResponse.json(data);
  } catch (e: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e.message }, { status: e.status || 500 });
  }
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    if (body.ids) {
      const data = await nocodb.bulkDelete(body.ids);
      return NextResponse.json(data);
    }
    const data = await nocodb.delete(body.id || body.Id);
    return NextResponse.json(data);
  } catch (e: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e.message }, { status: e.status || 500 });
  }
}
```

### 3. `app/api/nocodb/[id]/route.ts` — Get single record

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { nocodb } from '@/lib/nocodb';

export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const data = await nocodb.get(id);
    return NextResponse.json(data);
  } catch (e: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: e.message }, { status: e.status || 500 });
  }
}
```

### 4. `lib/nocodb-client.ts` — Browser-safe client (calls your API routes, NOT NocoDB directly)

```typescript
/**
 * NocoDB Client — Browser-safe
 * Calls /api/nocodb routes (never exposes the API key)
 */

interface ListParams {
  limit?: number;
  offset?: number;
  where?: string;
  sort?: string;
  fields?: string;
}

interface PageInfo {
  totalRows: number;
  page: number;
  pageSize: number;
  isFirstPage: boolean;
  isLastPage: boolean;
}

interface ListResponse<T = Record<string, unknown>> {
  list: T[];
  pageInfo: PageInfo;
}

async function api<T>(path: string, options: RequestInit = {}): Promise<T> {
  const res = await fetch(path, {
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options.headers },
    ...options,
  });
  if (!res.ok) {
    const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: res.statusText }));
    throw new Error(err.error || `Request failed: ${res.status}`);
  }
  return res.json();
}

export const nocodbClient = {
  async list<T = Record<string, unknown>>(params: ListParams = {}): Promise<ListResponse<T>> {
    const query = new URLSearchParams();
    Object.entries(params).forEach(([k, v]) => { if (v !== undefined) query.set(k, String(v)); });
    const qs = query.toString();
    return api<ListResponse<T>>(`/api/nocodb${qs ? '?' + qs : ''}`);
  },
  async get<T = Record<string, unknown>>(id: number | string): Promise<T> {
    return api<T>(`/api/nocodb/${id}`);
  },
  async create<T = Record<string, unknown>>(data: Record<string, unknown> | Record<string, unknown>[]): Promise<T> {
    return api<T>('/api/nocodb', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },
  async update<T = Record<string, unknown>>(data: Record<string, unknown> | Record<string, unknown>[]): Promise<T> {
    return api<T>('/api/nocodb', { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },
  async remove(id: number): Promise<unknown> {
    return api('/api/nocodb', { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify({ id }) });
  },
  async bulkRemove(ids: number[]): Promise<unknown> {
    return api('/api/nocodb', { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify({ ids }) });
  },
};
```

## Adaptation Notes

- If the project uses `src/` directory, nest under `src/lib/` and `src/app/api/`
- If TypeScript is not detected, generate `.js` equivalents (remove type annotations and interfaces)
- Check for existing `lib/` directory; if there's a `utils/` convention, follow that instead
- If the project already has a NocoDB integration, warn the user before overwriting
